meta.description: Smell index for Go. Maps to rubric.json rule_ref.

smells.name: Ignored error
smells.summary: Error return assigned to _ or discarded.

smells.name: Background mid-chain
smells.summary: context.Background used instead of propagated ctx.

smells.name: Loop variable capture
smells.summary: Closure captures iteration variable by reference.

smells.name: Missing defer Close
smells.summary: Opened resource not closed via defer.

smells.name: Producer-side interface
smells.summary: Interface defined next to its only implementation.

smells.name: HTTP without timeout
smells.summary: http.Get or default client without timeout.

smells.name: SQL string concat
smells.summary: Query built with + or Sprintf on input.

smells.name: Panic for normal errors
smells.summary: panic used instead of returning error.
